title: trianthema triquetrum var. triquetrum
intro: Trianthema triquetrum var. triquetrum, also known as pigspike or hairy pigspike, is a species of flowering plant in the Aizoaceae family that is native to Australia and parts of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Trianthema triquetrum var. triquetrum include its use as a treatment for wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Trianthema triquetrum var. triquetrum can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and topical ointments, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
